privileged_info_summary: The reading_progress task uses a synthetic 18-book reading log spanning January 8 to May 20, 2024, with all books being real, published titles verified through Goodreads and publisher sources. The dataset includes 5 Fiction, 5 Non-Fiction, 4 Sci-Fi, and 4 Mystery books with accurate page counts and author information. The 52-book annual goal (1 per week) represents approximately 34.6% completion as of mid-May. The task verification checks 8 criteria with a 70% pass threshold (6/8 criteria = 75%). All metadata claims about book counts, genres, date ranges, and verification criteria have been independently verified.
